inputs.prompt: Video title: Why You Can't Focus Anymore. Target audience: knowledge workers 25-40. Core emotion: Recognition — the viewer should feel seen, like someone finally named their problem. Channel style: Clean white backgrounds, host on right, bold text on left.

Video title: How LIDAR Changed Archaeology Forever. Target audience: science-curious viewers and archaeology enthusiasts. Core emotion: Wonder — the viewer should feel like a lost world is being revealed. No presenter face.
Video title: Making Sourdough. Target audience: home bakers. Core emotion: Warmth.

Video title: Inside Barcelona's Fight Against Mass Tourism. Target audience: Europeans aged 25-50 interested in urban politics. Core emotion: Tension — the viewer should feel the conflict between economic benefit and community destruction. Presenter appears in the thumbnail.
Video title: Life Advice. Target audience: young adults. Core emotion: Something motivational.
